notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, shortstop Daniel Schneemann to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Bobby Witt Jr. out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.
